notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This property or page doesn't exist, or the listing may still be awaiting approval.

metadata.title: Amnii
metadata.description: The most reliable platform for real estate in Rwanda.

hero.title: Discover your next home in Rwanda
hero.subtitle: Search apartments, houses, and rooms across Kigali and all 30 districts. Contact owners directly — always free.
hero.subtitleLoggedIn: Welcome back, {name}. Pick up where you left off — your saved homes and alerts are in your portal.
hero.welcomeMorning0: Good morning, {name}. What are you looking for today?
hero.welcomeMorning1: Morning {name} — ready to find your next home?
hero.welcomeMorning2: Rise and search, {name}. Your perfect place is out there.
hero.welcomeMorning3: Hey {name}, a fresh day to discover Rwanda's best listings.
hero.welcomeAfternoon0: Good afternoon, {name}. Still hunting for the right place?
hero.welcomeAfternoon1: Afternoon {name} — let's keep your search going.
hero.welcomeAfternoon2: Hi {name}, which neighbourhood catches your eye today?
hero.welcomeEvening0: Good evening, {name}. Wind down with a browse?
hero.welcomeEvening1: Evening {name} — save a few favourites before you call it a day.
hero.welcomeEvening2: Hey {name}, any new listings catch your eye today?
hero.welcomeNight0: Still up, {name}? Good listings never sleep.
hero.welcomeNight1: Late-night browsing, {name}? Your next home might be one scroll away.

home.urgentDesc: Properties that need tenants soon — contact owners directly today
home.safetyDesc: Never pay before visiting a property. Always verify the owner in person. Look for verified badges and report suspicious listings.
home.safetyWarning: Meet in person and inspect the property before paying any deposit. Report listings that pressure you to pay upfront.
home.featuresDesc: Built for Rwanda's housing market — transparent, local, and always free to browse

features.verifiedDesc: Every property is reviewed for accuracy. Look for verified badges before you visit or pay.
features.contactDesc: Phone and WhatsApp are always visible. Contact owners and agents directly — no hidden fees.
features.localDesc: Search by province, district, and sector across all 30 districts of Rwanda.

listing.contactFree: Contact the owner or agent directly using the details below.
listing.safetyText: Never send money before visiting in person. Verify the property and owner before any payment.
listing.ownerDirectSeekerTip: Owner-direct listing — meet the lister and confirm they control the property. Verified agent-managed listings are generally safer because Amnii reviews agents before they go live.
listing.reportDesc: Help us keep Amnii safe. Reports are reviewed by our team.
listing.pendingReviewDesc: Your listing was submitted successfully. It will appear in search once our team approves it — usually within 24 hours.
listing.pendingOwnerOnly: Only you can see this page until the listing is approved.

search.title: Find Properties in Rwanda
search.found: {count} listings found · Visit in person before paying any deposit
search.foundOne: 1 listing found · Visit in person before paying any deposit
search.noResultsHint: Try removing filters or searching a different district.

login.subtitle: Sign in to save listings, manage your properties, and list on Amnii.
login.verifyEmail: Account created. Check your email to verify, then sign in.
login.trustNote: Your account keeps your listings secure. Never pay a deposit before visiting a property in person.
login.noAccountNeeded: No account needed to browse or contact owners and agents.
login.accountBenefits: Create an account to save favourites, list a property, or manage your agent profile.
login.intentSeekerDesc: Save favourites, set alerts, and track your search (free)
login.intentOwnerDesc: Publish rentals or sales and manage inquiries
login.intentAgentDesc: Verified public profile and client listings
login.referralLabel: How did you hear about us?
login.referral_agent_owner: An agent or landlord told me
login.referralRequired: Please tell us how you found Amnii.
login.referralOtherRequired: Please specify how you heard about us.
login.districtLabel: Where are you based or searching?
login.districtHint: Helps us show relevant listings and measure reach by area.
login.lookingForRequired: Please tell us what you're looking for.
login.phoneHint: Optional — only used if we need to reach you about your account.

about.label: About us
about.heroTitle: Rwanda's trusted address for real estate
about.heroDesc: We connect seekers, owners, and agents with clarity — no hidden contacts, no noise.
about.valuesDesc: Simple principles that keep the marketplace honest.
about.trustDesc: Verification, reporting, and transparent contact build confidence on both sides.
about.directDesc: Seekers reach owners or agents immediately. We never hide phone numbers behind a paywall.
about.rwandaDesc: Districts, sectors, commissioners, and local search patterns — designed for how Kigali actually works.
about.step1Desc: Browse verified listings across Kigali and all 30 districts. Filter by price, area, and type.
about.step2Desc: Contact the owner or agent directly by phone or WhatsApp. No middleman fees.
about.step3Desc: Inspect the property in person. Never pay before you have seen it and met the lister.
about.rolesTitle: Built for everyone in the market
about.seekersDesc: Find homes across Rwanda. Save favourites, contact directly, stay safe.
about.ownersDesc: List for free. Manage your properties and reach serious tenants and buyers.
about.agentsDesc: Build your profile, manage client listings, earn verified status.
about.safetyIntro: Your security matters. Follow these rules every time you search for housing.
about.safetyTip1Desc: Never send money before physically visiting the property and meeting the owner or agent.
about.safetyTip2Desc: Look for verified badges and confirm property details match what you see in person.
about.safetyTip3Desc: Contact landlords through the phone or WhatsApp numbers shown on the listing.
about.safetyTip4Desc: Report scams, duplicates, or wrong information to help keep the marketplace safe.

faq.a1: Yes. Browsing listings and contacting owners or agents is completely free on Amnii.
faq.q2: How do I list my property?
faq.a2: Create an account, then use List Property. Choose owner-direct or agent-managed, add photos and details, and publish.
faq.q3: What is Owner Direct vs Agent Managed?
faq.a3: Owner Direct means you manage the listing and seekers contact you. Agent Managed means a verified Amnii agent handles inquiries on your behalf.
faq.a4: Verified listings and agents have passed our review process. Look for the gold verified badge.
faq.q5: How do I stay safe from scams?
faq.a5: Never send money before visiting in person. Verify the lister, use contact details shown on Amnii only, and report suspicious listings.
faq.q6: Can owners and agents both list?
faq.a6: Yes. Many owners list directly. Others work with a commissioner or agent — Amnii supports both paths.
faq.a7: Agents maintain a public profile, manage listings, earn verified status, and build ratings from response time and quality.
faq.a8: Use the report option on any listing or contact us via the About page. Multiple reports trigger an automatic review.

footer.tagline: Made for Rwanda · Visit before you pay · Report suspicious listings

portal.chooseDesc: Select the portal that matches your role. Sign in to sync your data across devices.
portal.seekerDesc: Save favourites, get alerts, and track your home search.
portal.ownerDesc: Post listings, view analytics, and manage inquiries.
portal.agentDesc: Manage multiple listings and grow your reputation.
portal.seekerDashboardDesc: Track saved properties, preferences, and recently viewed homes.
portal.noSavedYet: No saved listings yet — tap the heart on any property.
portal.ownerListingsDesc: Create, edit, pause, or remove your property listings.
portal.agentListingsDesc: Properties you manage on behalf of owners and clients.
portal.noListingsYet: No listings yet. Publish your first property to get started.
portal.ownerAnalyticsDesc: Real views, favorites, shares, and contact clicks on your listings.
portal.agentPerformanceDesc: Lead activity and listing reach from your managed properties.
portal.ownerOverviewDesc: Manage your listings, track performance, and respond to inquiries.
portal.agentOverviewDesc: Manage client listings, build your profile, and track leads.
portal.seekerOverviewDesc: Browse, save, and track properties you're interested in.
portal.inquiriesDesc: Messages from seekers about your listings.
portal.inquiriesEmpty: No inquiries yet. When seekers contact you, messages will appear here.
portal.notificationsDesc: Alerts for saved searches and new matching listings.
portal.notificationsEmpty: No notifications yet. Turn on alerts in your preferences.
portal.searchesDesc: Searches you run while signed in are saved here so you can jump back in.
portal.searchesEmpty: No recent searches yet. Use search on the home page or browse page — they'll appear here.
portal.searchesLocked: Run at least 2 searches while signed in to unlock your search history here.
portal.agentProfileDesc: How seekers see your agent profile on Amnii.

admin.title: Moderation centre
admin.subtitle: Review listings, handle reports, and suspend fraudulent accounts.
admin.accessDesc: Use the same login page as everyone else. Your admin account is created in the database — not through the public sign-up form.
admin.seedStep: Run npm run db:seed:admin locally once (uses your service role key).
admin.signInStep: Sign in at /login with the seeded email and password from .env.local.
admin.redirectStep: After sign-in, admins are redirected here automatically.
admin.listingsDesc: Approve or reject listings before they appear in search.
admin.reportsDesc: Review reports from seekers and take action on suspicious listings.
admin.usersDesc: Suspend accounts that abuse the platform. Suspended users cannot post new listings.
admin.agentsDesc: Verify license and ID documents before agents appear publicly.
admin.agentReportsDesc: Reports from seekers about fraudulent or abusive agents.
admin.feedbackDesc: Ratings and comments from engaged users after browsing.
admin.signupsDesc: How users find Amnii, what they're looking for, and where they're based.
admin.healthDesc: Key metrics for the last 7 days — sign-ups, engagement, and trust signals.
admin.pricingDesc: Median active listing prices by district and property type — internal market research.
admin.pricingEmpty: Not enough active listings for price bands yet.
admin.flagsDesc: Automated patterns: duplicate phones, high report counts, suspicious activity.
admin.flagsEmpty: No open flags. Run a scan after new reports come in.

districts.featuredHint: Popular districts shown first — search for any of the 30

rentalOutcome.subtitle: You contacted {listing} a while ago. Your answer helps other renters.

agents.noAgentsInDistrict: No agents in this district yet. Try another area.

favorites.empty: No saved listings yet. Tap the heart on any property.

authPrompt.favoriteDesc: Create a free account to bookmark listings and find them later in your seeker portal.
authPrompt.reviewTitle: Sign in to leave a review
authPrompt.reviewDesc: Only signed-in tenants can review agents after a rental experience.
authPrompt.reportDesc: Reports help us ban fraudulent agents. Sign in so we can follow up.
authPrompt.browseFree: Browsing and contacting owners is always free — no account required.

feedback.title: How is Amnii so far?
feedback.subtitle: Quick feedback helps us improve for Rwanda.
feedback.thanks: Thank you — we read every response.

preferences.title: Your search preferences
preferences.desc: Tell us what you're looking for — we'll use this for alerts and recommendations.
preferences.alerts: Email me when new listings match my preferences
preferences.alertsHint: We'll notify you as matching properties are approved (coming to email soon).

reviews.title: Rate this agent
reviews.rentalOnly: Reviews are for rental experiences with this agent.
reviews.agentsOnly: Reviews are for agents only — not properties. Properties are reported separately.
reviews.accountRequired: Sign-in required. One review per rental experience.
reviews.reportSubmitted: Report submitted. Our team will review.

agentOnboarding.title: Agent verification
agentOnboarding.desc: Submit your credentials for admin review before your profile goes live.
agentOnboarding.pendingDesc: An Amnii admin is verifying your documents. You'll be notified once approved.
agentOnboarding.approvedDesc: Your agent profile is live. Manage listings from your agent portal.
agentOnboarding.rejected: Application rejected: {reason}. Update your documents and resubmit.

listPropertyForm.title: List Your Property
listPropertyForm.subtitle: Free to list. Choose owner-direct or agent-managed. Every submission is reviewed before it goes live.
listPropertyForm.ownerDirectDesc: List a property you own or legally control. Seekers contact you directly.
listPropertyForm.ownerDirectTrustTip: Only list homes you own or are authorised to rent or sell. Some people post properties they do not control and finalise deals off-platform — that hurts trust.
listPropertyForm.agentManagedDesc: Link a verified Amnii agent. Seekers contact them.
listPropertyForm.agentManagedTrustTip: Verified Amnii agents are reviewed by our team. Many seekers prefer agent-managed listings because identity and conduct are checked.
listPropertyForm.agentApplyTip: Want to work as an agent on Amnii? Apply in the agent portal — agents must be verified before they can manage listings publicly.
listPropertyForm.ownerOwnershipLabel: I confirm I own this property or have legal authority to list it on Amnii.
listPropertyForm.photoHint: Add a cover photo for search cards. JPG or PNG, up to 5 MB.
listPropertyForm.additionalPhotosDesc: Add up to 4 extra photos — kitchen, bedrooms, bathroom, exterior. Shown only on the property detail page.
listPropertyForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your property, amenities, and neighborhood…
listPropertyForm.contactHint: This number appears on your listing. Seekers contact you directly by phone or WhatsApp.

support.title: Still have questions?
support.desc: Our team is happy to help after you've read the FAQ.
support.hours: We typically reply within a few hours on business days.
